image:image.image:title: COPPER BUS BAR Universal (55x20x2mm) - Tin Coated
image:image.image:caption: 55x20x2 mm; Pure Copper; Silver | High Conductivity Copper Material with Tin Coating for Corrosion Resistance, this component is specifically designed for Prismatic Lithium Batteries, ensuring Low Resistance Current Transfer with Strong and Durable Construction for Easy Installation in Battery Pack

image:image.image:title: COPPER BUS BAR Universal (55x20x2mm) - Tin Coated
image:image.image:caption: 55x20x2 mm; Pure Copper; Silver | High Conductivity Copper Material with Tin Coating for Corrosion Resistance, this component is specifically designed for Prismatic Lithium Batteries, ensuring Low Resistance Current Transfer with Strong and Durable Construction for Easy Installation in Battery Pack
